OAuthClientApplicationId.markdownDescription:
---

Required: Yes  
Type: String  
Minimum Length: 1  
Maximum Length: 256  
Pattern: [^/][^\u0000-\u001f]*  
Update requires: Replacement

Arn.markdownDescription:
---

Required: No  
Type: String  
Pattern: ^arn:[-a-z0-9]*:quicksight:[-a-z0-9]*:[0-9]{12}:oauthclientapplication/.+  
Update requires: No interruption
Read only property: Yes
